overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking along a rocky coastal beach with mountains in the background. The character approaches and passes a sunken car wreck in the shallow water while power lines run parallel to the shore on the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky coastal path with utility poles

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rocky beach path toward the distant mountains

entered.detail: overhead electrical wires running parallel to the coastline
wooden telephone pole with crossbars and wires
large hazy mountains forming the backdrop across the water
calm ocean water lapping against the shore
small dilapidated building near the tree line

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide coastal landscape with the camera moving forward along a rocky dirt path. Power lines run along the left side while mountains rise in the distance across the water. The scene is empty of people, with only sparse vegetation and a distant abandoned structure visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: shoreline with partially submerged vehicle wreck

events.description: sunken car wreck becomes clearly visible in the shallow surf
camera turns slightly toward the water to approach the wreck

agents.ego_description: approaching the water's edge to inspect the rusted vehicle wreck sitting in the waves

entered.detail: rusted sedan partially submerged in the shallow water with doors open
scattered boulders along the waterline near the wreck

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a rusted car wreck sitting in the shallow surf. The character moves closer to the water's edge, revealing the vehicle's open doors and deteriorated state. The power lines recede into the distance on the left as the focus shifts to the wreck and the lapping waves.

events.description: character turns back toward the main path and continues along the shore

agents.ego_description: continuing along the coast past the wreck toward distant buildings and palm trees

entered.detail: tall palm tree near the buildings ahead
red and white striped communications tower on the hillside
wooden signpost with multiple placards near the path

segments.scene_description: Having passed the wreck, the camera continues along the upper beach path. A palm tree and radio tower become visible on the left as the character approaches a small settlement. The power lines continue running parallel to the route while the mountains remain prominent across the water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a desolate coastline that transitions from a wide, rocky expanse toward a small coastal settlement. It begins on a dirt path flanked by power lines on the left, with sparse vegetation and distant mountains framing the empty landscape. As the camera advances, the path leads toward the water's edge, where the focus shifts to a rusted car wreck sitting in the shallow surf with its doors open to the lapping waves. The scene then opens back up as the camera passes the wreck and continues along the upper beach, where a palm tree and radio tower emerge on the left. Finally, the movement carries the viewer toward a small settlement while the power lines and distant mountains remain constant fixtures of the horizon.
